---
title: "Compiling dataset"
author: "Bruno Sullivan"
date: "2025-12-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r}

library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(tibble)



p17 <- read.csv("prices2017.csv")
p18 <- read.csv("prices2018.csv")
p19 <- read.csv("prices2019.csv")
p20 <- read.csv("prices2020.csv")
p21 <- read.csv("prices2021.csv")
p22 <- read.csv("prices2022.csv")
p23 <- read.csv("prices2023.csv")

c17 <- read.csv("cdsdata_2017.csv")
c18 <- read.csv("cdsdata_2018.csv")
c19 <- read.csv("cdsdata_2019.csv")
c20 <- read.csv("cdsdata_2020.csv")
c21 <- read.csv("cdsdata_2021.csv")
c22 <- read.csv("cdsdata_2022.csv")
c23 <- read.csv("cdsdata_2023.csv")

i17_19 <- read.csv("DailyImpliedVolatility2017_2019.csv")
i20_21 <- read.csv("DailyImpliedVolatility2020_2021.csv")
i22_23 <- read.csv("DailyImpliedVolatility2022_2023.csv")


##cut out 2024-25 due to lack of implied volatility data###
combine_market_data <- function(start_date = "2017-01-01",
                                end_date   = "2023-12-31") {


  all_prices <- dplyr::bind_rows(p17, p18, p19, p20, p21, p22, p23)
  names(all_prices)[names(all_prices) == "TICKER"] <- "ticker"
  all_prices$date <- as.Date(all_prices$date)

  all_prices <- all_prices %>%
    dplyr::select(ticker, date, PRC, VOL, RET, SHROUT) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(ticker, date, .keep_all = TRUE)

  
  all_cds <- dplyr::bind_rows(c17, c18, c19, c20, c21, c22, c23)
  all_cds$date <- as.Date(all_cds$date)

  all_cds <- all_cds %>%
    dplyr::select(ticker, date, parspread, sector) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(ticker, date, .keep_all = TRUE)


  all_iv <- dplyr::bind_rows(i17_19, i20_21, i22_23)
  all_iv$date <- as.Date(all_iv$date)

  all_iv <- all_iv %>%
    dplyr::select(ticker, date, impl_volatility) %>%
    dplyr::distinct(ticker, date, .keep_all = TRUE)

  ###taking only tickers common across all 3 datasets###

  common_tickers <- Reduce(
    intersect,
    list(
      unique(all_prices$ticker),
      unique(all_cds$ticker),
      unique(all_iv$ticker)
    )
  )

  prices_common <- all_prices[all_prices$ticker %in% common_tickers, ]
  cds_common    <- all_cds[all_cds$ticker %in% common_tickers, ]
  iv_common     <- all_iv[all_iv$ticker %in% common_tickers, ]

  all_dates <- seq(as.Date(start_date), as.Date(end_date), by = "day")

  complete_grid <- tidyr::expand_grid(
    ticker = common_tickers,
    date   = all_dates
  ) %>%
    as_tibble() %>%
    dplyr::mutate(date = as.Date(date))

  join_with_grid <- function(df, grid) {
    grid %>%
      dplyr::left_join(df, by = c("ticker", "date")) %>%
      dplyr::arrange(ticker, date)
  }

  prices_complete <- join_with_grid(prices_common, complete_grid)
  cds_complete    <- join_with_grid(cds_common,    complete_grid)
  iv_complete     <- join_with_grid(iv_common,     complete_grid)

  cds_subset <- cds_complete %>%
    dplyr::select(ticker, date, parspread, sector)

  iv_subset <- iv_complete %>%
    dplyr::select(ticker, date, impl_volatility)

  combined_data <- prices_complete %>%
    dplyr::left_join(cds_subset, by = c("ticker", "date")) %>%
    dplyr::left_join(iv_subset,  by = c("ticker", "date")) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(ticker, date)

  combined_data
}

combined_data <- combine_market_data()

write.csv(combined_data,
          "combined_market_data_2017_2023.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)



focused_columns <- c("ticker", "date", "impl_volatility", "parspread", "RET")

focused_data <- combined_data %>%
  dplyr::select(dplyr::all_of(focused_columns))

focused_data$RET <- as.numeric(focused_data$RET)

#check missing values#

overall_na <- focused_data %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_obs        = dplyr::n(),
    iv_missing       = sum(is.na(impl_volatility)),
    iv_present       = sum(!is.na(impl_volatility)),
    iv_missing_pct   = round(mean(is.na(impl_volatility)) * 100, 2),
    spread_missing   = sum(is.na(parspread)),
    spread_present   = sum(!is.na(parspread)),
    spread_missing_pct = round(mean(is.na(parspread)) * 100, 2),
    ret_missing      = sum(is.na(RET)),
    ret_present      = sum(!is.na(RET)),
    ret_missing_pct  = round(mean(is.na(RET)) * 100, 2)
  )

print(overall_na)


ticker_completeness <- focused_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ticker) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_days        = dplyr::n(),
    all_three_present = sum(
      !is.na(impl_volatility) &
      !is.na(parspread) &
      !is.na(RET)
    ),
    pct_all_three     = round(all_three_present / total_days * 100, 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(pct_all_three)

write.csv(ticker_completeness,
          "ticker_completeness_full.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

##drop tickers with less than 40% of total days###

completeness_threshold <- 40

acceptable_tickers_40 <- ticker_completeness %>%
  dplyr::filter(pct_all_three >= completeness_threshold) %>%
  dplyr::pull(ticker)

filtered_data_40 <- focused_data %>%
  dplyr::filter(ticker %in% acceptable_tickers_40)

write.csv(filtered_data_40,
          "filtered_data_40percent.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

#now checking again for missing values#

pattern_analysis_40 <- filtered_data_40 %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    iv_missing     = is.na(impl_volatility),
    spread_missing = is.na(parspread),
    ret_missing    = is.na(RET),
    num_missing    = iv_missing + spread_missing + ret_missing,
    num_present    = 3 - num_missing,
    pattern_category = dplyr::case_when(
      num_missing == 0,                      
      num_missing == 1 & iv_missing,
      num_missing == 1 & spread_missing,
      num_missing == 1 & ret_missing,
      num_missing == 2 & !iv_missing,
      num_missing == 2 & !spread_missing,
      num_missing == 2 & !ret_missing,
      num_missing == 3,
      TRUE  
    ),
    missing_var = dplyr::case_when(
      num_missing == 1 & iv_missing, 
      num_missing == 1 & spread_missing,
      num_missing == 1 & ret_missing,
      TRUE                      
    ),
    present_var = dplyr::case_when(
      num_present == 1 & !iv_missing,
      num_present == 1 & !spread_missing,
      num_present == 1 & !ret_missing,
      TRUE                            
    )
  )

total_obs_40 <- nrow(pattern_analysis_40)

pattern_summary_40 <- pattern_analysis_40 %>%
  dplyr::count(pattern_category) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    percentage = round(n / total_obs_40 * 100, 2)
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(n))

print(pattern_summary_40)


aggregated_summary_40 <- pattern_analysis_40 %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    Total_Observations    = dplyr::n(),
    IV_Missing_Rate       = round(mean(iv_missing) * 100, 2),
    Spread_Missing_Rate   = round(mean(spread_missing) * 100, 2),
    RET_Missing_Rate      = round(mean(ret_missing) * 100, 2),
    All_Three_Present     = sum(num_missing == 0),
    All_Three_Present_Pct = round(mean(num_missing == 0) * 100, 2),
    One_Missing_Total     = sum(num_missing == 1),
    One_Missing_Pct       = round(mean(num_missing == 1) * 100, 2),
    One_Present_Total     = sum(num_present == 1),
    One_Present_Pct       = round(mean(num_present == 1) * 100, 2),
    All_Missing_Total     = sum(num_missing == 3),
    All_Missing_Pct       = round(mean(num_missing == 3) * 100, 2),
    Two_Missing_Total     = sum(num_missing == 2),
    Two_Missing_Pct       = round(mean(num_missing == 2) * 100, 2)
  )

print(aggregated_summary_40)



one_missing_breakdown_40 <- pattern_analysis_40 %>%
  dplyr::filter(num_missing == 1) %>%
  dplyr::count(missing_var) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_one_missing        = sum(n),
    pct_of_one_missing      = round(n / total_one_missing * 100, 2),
    pct_of_total_40         = round(n / total_obs_40 * 100, 2)
  )

one_present_breakdown_40 <- pattern_analysis_40 %>%
  dplyr::filter(num_present == 1) %>%
  dplyr::count(present_var) %>%
  dplyr::mutate(
    total_one_present       = sum(n),
    pct_of_one_present      = round(n / total_one_present * 100, 2),
    pct_of_total_40         = round(n / total_obs_40 * 100, 2)
  )


write.csv(pattern_summary_40,
          "detailed_pattern_summary_40percent.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

formatted_aggregated_40 <- data.frame(
  Metric = c(
    "Total Observations",
    "IV Missing Rate (%)",
    "Spread Missing Rate (%)",
    "RET Missing Rate (%)",
    "All Three Present (count)",
    "All Three Present (%)",
    "Exactly One Missing (count)",
    "Exactly One Missing (%)",
    "Exactly One Present (count)",
    "Exactly One Present (%)",
    "All Missing (count)",
    "All Missing (%)",
    "Two Missing (count)",
    "Two Missing (%)"
  ),
  Value = c(
    aggregated_summary_40$Total_Observations,
    aggregated_summary_40$IV_Missing_Rate,
    aggregated_summary_40$Spread_Missing_Rate,
    aggregated_summary_40$RET_Missing_Rate,
    aggregated_summary_40$All_Three_Present,
    aggregated_summary_40$All_Three_Present_Pct,
    aggregated_summary_40$One_Missing_Total,
    aggregated_summary_40$One_Missing_Pct,
    aggregated_summary_40$One_Present_Total,
    aggregated_summary_40$One_Present_Pct,
    aggregated_summary_40$All_Missing_Total,
    aggregated_summary_40$All_Missing_Pct,
    aggregated_summary_40$Two_Missing_Total,
    aggregated_summary_40$Two_Missing_Pct
  )
)

write.csv(formatted_aggregated_40,
          "aggregated_summary_40percent.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


ticker_stats_40 <- filtered_data_40 %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ticker) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_days        = dplyr::n(),
    iv_missing        = sum(is.na(impl_volatility)),
    spread_missing    = sum(is.na(parspread)),
    ret_missing       = sum(is.na(RET)),
    all_three_present = sum(
      !is.na(impl_volatility) &
      !is.na(parspread) &
      !is.na(RET)
    ),
    pct_all_three     = round(all_three_present / total_days * 100, 2),
    pct_iv_missing    = round(iv_missing / total_days * 100, 2),
    pct_spread_missing = round(spread_missing / total_days * 100, 2),
    pct_ret_missing   = round(ret_missing / total_days * 100, 2),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  dplyr::arrange(dplyr::desc(pct_all_three))

write.csv(ticker_stats_40,
          "ticker_level_stats_40percent.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

##building our final dataset##

simple_final_data <- filtered_data_40 %>%
  dplyr::arrange(ticker, date)

write.csv(simple_final_data,
          "iv-return-spread-simple.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)


completeness_check <- simple_final_data %>%
  dplyr::group_by(ticker) %>%
  dplyr::summarise(
    total_days   = dplyr::n(),
    all_three    = sum(
      !is.na(impl_volatility) &
      !is.na(parspread) &
      !is.na(RET)
    ),
    completeness = all_three / total_days * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

write.csv(completeness_check,
          "simple_final_completeness_by_ticker.csv",
          row.names = FALSE)

#loading our epu and merging it for complete database##

epu_df <- read.csv("EPU_data_ext.csv")
epu_df$date       <- as.Date(epu_df$date)
combined_data$date <- as.Date(combined_data$date)
combined_data <- combined_data %>%
  dplyr::left_join(
    epu_df,
    by = "date"
  )


###summary statisitcs table###

sum_stat <- combined_data %>%
  dplyr::select(ticker, sector, diff_parspread, RET, diff_impvol, daily_policy_index) %>%
  drop_na()

summary_stats <- df_clean %>%
  dplyr::select(diff_parspread, RET, diff_impvol, daily_policy_index) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = everything()) %>%
  group_by(name) %>%
  summarise(
    N    = n(),
    Mean = mean(value),
    SD   = sd(value),
    Min  = min(value),
    Max  = max(value)
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    Variable = recode(name,
      d_log_cds = "Δ log(CDS)",
      ret       = "Stock Returns",
      d_log_iv  = "Δ log(Implied Volatility)",
      EPU       = "Policy Uncertainty (EPU)"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Variable, N, Mean, SD, Min, Max)

```
